query: SELECT id, title, celexId, effectiveDate, LEFT(description, 200) as desc_preview FROM regulations WHERE celexId = '32023R1115' OR title LIKE '%Deforestation%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT id, title, celexId, effectiveDate, LEFT(description, 200) as desc_preview FROM regulations WHERE celexId = '32023R1115' OR title LIKE '%Deforestation%' LIMIT 1;

rows.title: EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
rows.desc_preview: Ensures products sold in EU are not linked to deforestation or forest degradation.

stdout:
id	title	celexId	effectiveDate	desc_preview
